**CORRECTION** 02/07/05: BASED ON COURT OF APPEAL ISSUED OPINION RE PROPOSITION 64, THIS COURT MUST OVERRULE DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER. LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT ENERGY BRANDS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE COURT'S RULING IS EFFECTIVE TODAY. COUNSEL ARE DIRECTED TO MEET AND CONFER REGARDING THE STATEMENT OF DECISION; TO BE SUBMITTED TO THE COURT NO LATER THAN 01/28/05. IF COUNSEL CANNOT AGREE UPON A PROPOSED STATEMENT OF DECISION, THEY MAY EACH SUBMIT THEIR PROPOSED STATEMENTS, IN WHOLE OR PART. DEFENDANT ENERGY BRANDS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO 01/28/05 TO BE TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AT THAT TIME IN REGARD TO THE STATEMENT OF DECISION. JUDGE: JAMES L. MINI MINUTES:

Courtcall Appearance: G. Richard Baker, Esq., Campbell & Baker, 205-278-6650, for plaintiff and opposing party Denise Schickel.

RULING:
A R G U E D; The Court considered DEFENDANT ENERGY BRANDS, INC.'S Motion For Reconsideration Re Order overrruling Demurrer. The Court sustained the demurrer. The issue of whether with leave to amend or without leave to amend is taken UNDER SUBMISSION. Counsel shall submit proposed forms of order. (301/JLW/DS) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-19-2005 Continued To Jan-28-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
**CORRECTION TO MINUTES**: Court of Appeal ruling that Proposition 64 does not apply to pending cases - Therefore, notwithstanding the Court's ruling from the bench, the Court OVERRULES Defendant's Demurrer - 02/07/05.
APPEARANCES:
Michael K. Brown, Esq., Reed & Smith, (213) 457-8080, for Defendant and Moving Party Energy Brands, Inc.
G. Richard Baker, Esq., Campbell & Baker, (205) 278-6650, appeared telephonically through Court Call for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Denise Schickel
RULING:
A R G U E D. DEFENDANT ENERGY BRANDS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED without leave to amend. The Court's ruling is effective today. Counsel are directed to meet and confer regarding the statement of decision; to be submitted to the Court no later than 01/28/05. If Counsel cannot agree upon a proposed statement of decision, they may each submit their proposed statements, in whole or part. DEFENDANT ENERGY BRANDS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is CONTINUED to 01/28/05 to be taken under submission at that time in regard to the statement of decision. (301/JLW/ds) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
